'''Denbo''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that hosted the ''[[Viraxo 54]]'' [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] facility, a cargo transfer and storage station operated by [[Viraxo Industries|Viraxo Shipping]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
